name: Successfully log in with valid credentials
description:
As an EventHub platform user
  I want to register and authenticate via the REST API
  So that I can obtain a JWT for protected EventHub operations
descriptionHtml:
As an EventHub platform user
I want to register and authenticate via the REST API
So that I can obtain a JWT for protected EventHub operations

steps.name: Then the response status code should be 200
And the response body should match the "eventhub-auth-response.json" schema
And the EventHub response should contain a valid JWT token
And the EventHub auth token should be stored for subsequent requests

items.statusDetails: Token API returned status 400 (expected 200). Body: {"success":false,"error":"Validation failed","details":[{"field":"email","message":"A valid email is required"}]}

Status code mismatch. Expected 200, actual 400.
Response diagnostic:
  Status: 400 HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request
  Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8
  Time: 1572 ms
  Body: {"success":false,"error":"Validation failed","details":[{"field":"email","message":"A valid email is required"},{"field":"password","message":"Password must be at least 6 characters"}]} expected [200] but found [400]
